description: Poem in Judaeo-Persian, edited and translated by Shaked, "פרקים במורשתם הקדומה של יהודי פרס," Peʿamim 1985, 35–37. There are various other text blocks in both Arabic script and Hebrew on this fragment. The earliest use is an official-looking account mentioning Shaʿbān 724 AH = July/August 1324 CE if read correctly. The later uses may be poetry in Persian or in Arabic, e.g. mentioning "كفر التركمان." Needs examination.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Persian, Persian מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
